or have the Cursed Birth background

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or have the Left to Die or Cursed Birth background

parsed_prerequisites.detail: alignment must be within one step of your deity's

parsed_prerequisites.detail: alignment must be within one step of your deity's

prerequisites: Dex 13, Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +14.
benefit: Finding just the right pressure point, you paralyze your foe with a single hit.

name: Parry Spell
benefit: You can throw an enemy spell back at its caster.

name: Parting Shot
prerequisites: Dex 13, Dodge, Mobility, Point Blank Shot, Shot on the Run, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You are an expert skirmisher, able to rain missiles upon your enemies whether advancing or retreating.

name: Pass For Human
benefit: You're easily mistaken for a human rather than a member of your own race.

name: Passing Trick
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Dodge, Improved Feint, Mobility, size Small or smaller.
benefit: Slipping past a foe gives you the chance to feint.

name: Penetrating Strike
prerequisites: Weapon Focus, base attack bonus +1, 12th-level fighter, proficiency with weapon.
benefit: Your attacks are capable of penetrating the defenses of some creatures.

name: Penetrating Strike, Mythic
benefit: You know just how to strike to bypass even the most heavily armored foe's defenses.

name: Perfect Strike
prerequisites: Dex 13, Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +8.
benefit: When wielding a monk weapon, your attacks can be extremely precise.

name: Performance Weapon Mastery
benefit: You wield all your weapons with the flair of a performer.

name: Performing Combatant
prerequisites: Dazzling Display, any one performance feat.
benefit: You treat every combat as a performance, bringing flare and showmanship.

name: Persistent Spell
benefit: You can modify a spell to become more tenacious when its targets resist its effect.

name: Persuasive
benefit: You are skilled at swaying attitudes and intimidating others into your way of thinking.

name: Persuasive, Mythic
benefit: You're a master of persuasion, be it with soothing words or harsh barking commands.

name: Piercing Spell
benefit: Your studies have helped you develop methods to overcome spell resistance.

name: Pin Down
benefit: You easily block enemy escapes.

name: Pinning Knockout
prerequisites: Dex 13, Greater Grapple, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 9th.
benefit: An opponent you have pinned is easy for you to knock out.

name: Pinning Rend
prerequisites: Dex 13, Greater Grapple, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 9th.
benefit: You tear flesh when you damage an opponent that you have pinned.

name: Pinpoint Poisoner
prerequisites: Poison use class feature, Craft (alchemy) 6 ranks, Adder Strike, Improved Unarmed Strike, Two-Weapon Fighting or flurry of blows class feature.
benefit: You deftly use specially prepared needles to apply poison for maximum effect.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Two-Weapon Fighting or flurry of blows

name: Pinpoint Targeting
prerequisites: Dex 19, Improved Precise Shot, Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, base attack bonus +16.
benefit: You can target the weak points in your opponent's armor.

name: Pinpoint Targeting, Mythic
benefit: Your attacks can home in on your opponent's weak spot and ignore many defenses.

name: Planar Preservationist
benefit: You know how to preserve and reconstitute extraplanar monsters as well as normal animals.

name: Planar Wild Shape
prerequisites: Wild shape class feature, Knowledge (planes) 5 ranks.
benefit: You can infuse your wild shape with planar strength.

name: Point Blank Master
prerequisites: Weapon Specialization with selected ranged weapon.
benefit: You are adept at firing ranged weapons in close quarters.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Weapon Specialization with selected ranged weapon

name: Point-Blank Shot
benefit: You are especially accurate when making ranged attacks against close targets.

name: Point-Blank Shot, Mythic
benefit: Your accuracy with ranged attacks is unmatched at point-blank range.

name: Pommel Strike Deed
prerequisites: Amateur Swashbuckler or panache class feature; base attack bonus +3.
benefit: With a surprise swipe with your pommel, you can topple a foe.

name: Potent Surge, Mythic
benefit: Your surge is more potent.

name: Power Attack
benefit: You can make exceptionally deadly melee attacks by sacrificing accuracy for strength.

name: Power Attack, Mythic
benefit: Your attacks are truly devastating.

name: Powerful Shape
prerequisites: Wild shape class feature, druid level 8th.
benefit: Your wild shapes are mighty and muscular.

name: Powerful Shape, Mythic
benefit: The forms you take in wild shape tower over their natural counterparts.

name: Practiced Tactician
benefit: With only a few quick gestures and commands, you can direct others in combat.

name: Precise Shot
benefit: You are adept at firing ranged attacks into melee.

name: Precise Strike
benefit: You are skilled at striking where it counts, as long as an ally distracts your foe.

name: Preferred Spell
benefit: You find it very easy to cast one particular spell.

name: Prodigy
benefit: You are naturally skilled at arts, professions, and the acquisition of knowledge.

name: Prone Shooter
prerequisites: Weapon Focus (crossbow or firearm), base attack bonus +1.
benefit: While prone, you use the ground to stabilize your aim while using a crossbow or firearm.

name: Prone Slinger
benefit: Your sideways sling release allows you to launch bullets and stones even while prone.

name: Prophet
prerequisites: Ability to cast divine spells, and you must either have received a vision from your god (or another appropriate supernatural entity) or have the Marked by the Gods background.
benefit: The truth has been revealed, and you have been chosen to deliver it.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: and you must either have received a vision from your god (or another appropriate supernatural entity) or have the Marked by the Gods background

name: Prophetic Visionary
benefit: Your oracular abilities give you a glimpse into the future.

name: Prophetic Visionary, Mythic
benefit: Your precognitive powers aid you further.

name: Pummeling Bully
prerequisites: Improved Reposition, Improved Trip, Improved Unarmed Strike, Pummeling Style; base attack bonus +9, brawler level 5th, or monk level 5th.
benefit: Your punch has the chance to trip or move your target.

name: Pummeling Charge
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Pummeling Style; base attack bonus +12, brawler level 8th, or monk level 8th.
benefit: Your charge ends with a mighty haymaker.

name: Pummeling Style
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike; base attack bonus +6, brawler's flurry class feature, or flurry of blows class feature.
benefit: You collect all your power into a single vicious and debilitating punch.

name: Punishing Kick
prerequisites: Con 13, Wis 13, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +8.
benefit: Your kicks are so powerful you use them to push or knock back your foes.

name: Pure Faith
benefit: Not only are you immune to disease, like most paladins, but you also are highly resilient to poisons.

name: Pushing Assault
prerequisites: Str 15, Power Attack, base attack bonus +1.
benefit: A strike made with a two-handed weapon can push a similar sized opponent backward.

name: Quarterstaff Master
benefit: You can wield a quarterstaff as either a two-handed or one-handed weapon.

name: Quick Bull Rush
prerequisites: Str 13, Improved Bull Rush, Power Attack, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You can barrel into your opponent and follow this with an attack.

name: Quick Channel
prerequisites: Knowledge (religion) 5 ranks, channel energy class feature.
benefit: Your divine energies flash with dazzling speed.

name: Quick Dirty Trick
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Dirty Trick, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You can perpetrate a dirty trick and deliver an attack before your opponent is the wiser.

name: Quick Drag
prerequisites: Str 13, Improved Drag, Power Attack, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You drag your enemy and deliver a punishing blow.

name: Quick Draw
benefit: You can draw weapons faster than most.

name: Quick Draw, Mythic
benefit: You can retrieve any item quickly, not just weapons.

name: Quick Reposition
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Reposition, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: Your opponent becomes an unwitting dance partner, following your lead while you fight.

name: Quick Steal
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Steal, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You are adept at relieving foes of their belongings even while you strike.

name: Quick Wild Shape
prerequisites: Wild shape class feature, caster level 8th.
benefit: You sacrifice power for speed in changing form.

name: Quicken Blessing
prerequisites: Access to a blessing's major power, blessings class feature.
benefit: You can deliver one of your blessings with greater speed.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Access to a blessing's major power

name: Quicken Spell
benefit: You can cast spells in a fraction of the normal time.

name: Quicken Spell-Like Ability
prerequisites: Spell-like ability at CL 10th or higher.
benefit: This creature can use one of its spell-like abilities with next to no effort.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: Spell-like ability at CL 10th or higher

name: Racial Heritage
benefit: The blood of a non-human ancestor flows in your veins.

name: Racial Heritage, Mythic
benefit: Your racial heritage mingles with your mythic power to become more pronounced.

name: Radiant Charge
benefit: When you charge, you do so with the power of faith.

name: Rage Casting
benefit: Your blood is raw and potent power, and you can burn it to empower your spells.

name: Raging Absorption
prerequisites: Ability to cast 2nd-level bloodrager spells, bloodrage class feature.
benefit: You can absorb hostile spell energy to refuel your continued bloodrage.

name: Raging Blood
prerequisites: Eldritch Heritage or sorcerer bloodline class feature.
benefit: Your blood boils with latent energy, filling you with an intense fury.

name: Raging Brutality
prerequisites: Str 13, rage class feature, Power Attack, base attack bonus +12.
benefit: You expend some of your rage to strike your opponents with a more powerful weapon blow.

name: Raging Concentration
benefit: When you are in the heat of rage, not even pain can break your concentration.

name: Raging Deathblow
benefit: Every killing blow gives you a surge of vitality, further fueling your rage.

name: Raging Hurler
benefit: An opponent can do little to evade your wrathful pitching of weapons and objects.

name: Raging Throw
prerequisites: Str 13, Con 13, rage class feature, Improved Bull Rush, Power Attack, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You expend some of your rage to throw one opponent at another.

name: Raging Vitality
benefit: While raging, you are full of vigor and health.

name: Ranged Study
prerequisites: Weapon Focus with the chosen weapon, studied combat class feature.
benefit: You can use a limited form of studied combat and studied strike with a weapon of your choice.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Weapon Focus with the chosen weapon

name: Rapid Grappler
prerequisites: Dex 13, Greater Grapple, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 9th.
benefit: You are a quick hand at grappling.

name: Rapid Reload
prerequisites: Weapon Proficiency (crossbow type chosen) or Exotic Weapon Proficiency (firearm).
benefit: Choose a type of crossbow (hand, light, heavy) or a single type of one-handed or two-handed firearm that you are proficient with. You can reload such a weapon quickly.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: Weapon Proficiency (crossbow type chosen) or Exotic Weapon Proficiency (firearm)

name: Rapid Reload, Mythic
benefit: You can reload any type of weapon with astounding speed.

name: Rapid Shot
benefit: You can make an additional ranged attack.

name: Rapid Shot, Mythic
benefit: You can fire many times each round with amazing precision.

name: Ray Shield
benefit: You can even deflect rays with your shield.

name: Razortusk
benefit: Your powerful jaws and steely teeth are deadly enough to give you a bite attack.

name: Reach Spell
benefit: Your spells go farther than normal.

name: Reactive Healing
prerequisites: Quick Channel or Quicken Spell; channel energy or lay on hands class feature.
benefit: You can channel healing energy in response to an attack that would knock you unconscious.

parsed_prerequisites.name: channel energy or lay on hands

name: Realistic Likeness
benefit: When you are in human form, you can take the shape of a specific individual.

name: Rebounding Leap
prerequisites: Leaping lance class feature, Acrobatics 5 ranks, Ride 11 ranks.
benefit: Your riding and lancing expertise allows you to enter and leave the saddle with great speed.

name: Rebuffing Reduction
prerequisites: Str 13, damage reduction, Improved Bull Rush, Power Attack, base attack bonus +1.
benefit: Your damage reduction can turn the force of blows back on your enemies.

name: Reckless Rage
prerequisites: Power Attack; rage or raging song class feature.
benefit: Your boundless rage grants your blows extra strength, though at the expense of accuracy.

name: Recovered Rage
prerequisites: Rage or raging song class feature.
benefit: You regain rounds of rage or raging performance when you drop a foe.

name: Redemption
prerequisites: You must have lost class features by violating the code of conduct of a class that possesses such a code, or have the Dishonored Family background.
benefit: Your past failure haunts you and drives you on.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or have the Dishonored Family background

name: Remote Bomb
benefit: You can set off your delayed bombs at great distances.

name: Rending Claws
prerequisites: Str 13, two claw natural weapon attacks, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: Your claw attacks do greater harm to your enemy.

name: Rending Fury
prerequisites: Base attack bonus +6, rend special attack.
benefit: You easily tear your enemies limb from limb with your natural attacks.

name: Repositioning Strike
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Trip, base attack bonus +9.
benefit: Your critical hits can move your foes where you wish.

name: Resilient Armor
prerequisites: Divine bond (armor or shield), or sacred armor class feature.
benefit: When you enhance your armor or shield, you gain a measure of damage reduction.

name: Resilient Brute
benefit: You absorb punishment others find deadly.

name: Resilient Eidolon
benefit: Your link with your eidolon is strong enough that it can remain with you for a short time after you fall unconscious or are killed.

name: Resolute Rager
benefit: Fear passes quickly while you are raging.

name: Revelation Strike
prerequisites: Revelation class feature, Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: Your unarmed strike brings a revelation down upon your foe.

name: Reverse-Feint
benefit: You can goad an opponent into attacking you in order to make your counter attack all the more powerful.

name: Reward of Grace
benefit: When you lay on hands, divine energy ripples through you, granting you grace.

name: Reward of Life
benefit: When you lay on hands, you are also healed.

name: Rhetorical Flourish
benefit: You rapidly change topics and employ confusing rhetoric to distract people from your true intent.

name: Rhetorical Flourish, Mythic
benefit: You're supremely skilled at using verbal misdirection and finesse to influence others.

name: Ricochet Shot Deed
prerequisites: Grit class feature or Amateur Gunslinger feat, Blind-Fight.
benefit: You can ricochet a firearm shot off the wall and still hit your target.

name: Ricochet Splash Weapon
benefit: Even when your thrown splash weapons miss, they are especially dangerous.

name: Ride-By Attack
benefit: While mounted and charging, you can move, strike at a foe, and then continue moving.

name: Ride-By Attack, Mythic
benefit: You can make multiple attacks as you ride past your enemies.

name: Righteous Healing
benefit: Your healing spells are more potent when you have a judgment active.

name: Rime Spell
benefit: Creatures damaged by your spells with the cold descriptor become entangled.

name: Risky Striker
benefit: You can make yourself a little more vulnerable to larger creatures in order to land a devastating blow.

name: Riving Strike
prerequisites: Arcane Strike, ability to cast arcane spells.
benefit: When you infuse your weapon with arcane might, your attacks make foes more susceptible to magic.

name: Run
benefit: You are swift of foot.

name: Run, Mythic
benefit: You run with preternatural speed and endurance.

name: Sacred Summons
prerequisites: Aura class feature, ability to cast summon monster.
benefit: The minions of your divine patrons stand ready to answer your call.

name: Sap Adept
benefit: You know just where to hit to knock the sense out of your foe.

name: Sap Master
benefit: You knock the sense out of foes with a well-timed surprise attack.

name: Savage Display
benefit: With your victory and a roar, you push yourself on with increased savagery.

name: Saving Shield
benefit: You deflect attacks that could mean your ally's death.

name: Saving Shield, Mythic
benefit: Shielding a comrade from harm gives you a chance to strike back.

name: Scavenger's Eye
benefit: Your gaze is naturally drawn to valuable glittering objects.

name: School Strike
prerequisites: Wizard school class feature, Improved Unarmed Strike.
benefit: You focus the secrets of your school of wizardry into your unarmed strike.

name: Scorching Weapons
benefit: Elemental fire stirs within your body, boiling your blood and rendering you resistant to flame.

name: Scorpion Style
benefit: You can perform an unarmed strike that greatly hampers your target's movement.

name: Scorpion Style, Mythic
benefit: Your unarmed strikes can induce a near-crippling lethargy in your enemies.

name: Scribe Scroll
benefit: You can create magic scrolls.

name: Sea Hunter
benefit: Your blows knock swimming opponents off balance.

name: Sea Legs
benefit: You have a sailor's instincts for moving about while aboard seagoing vessels.

name: Second Chance
prerequisites: Int 13, Combat Expertise, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: Quick reflexes turn missed strikes into second chances.

name: Secret Stash Deed
prerequisites: Grit class feature or Amateur Gunslinger feat, Sleight of Hand 1 rank.
benefit: You are so skilled at stashing small packets of firearm ammunition and black powder on your person that you sometimes surprise yourself when you find them.

name: Seen and Unseen
benefit: Your anonymity makes you difficult to find through magical or mundane means, and you have learned how to combat both of your progenitor races.

name: Seething Hatred
benefit: You've learned to channel your hatred of a particular type of creature into a devastating strike.

name: Seize Advantage
benefit: You can take advantage of your foes when they overcommit on their attacks.

name: Seize the Moment
benefit: You and your allies are poised to pounce whenever one of you scores a telling blow.

name: Selective Channeling
benefit: You can choose whom to affect when you channel energy.

name: Selective Channeling, Mythic
benefit: When you exclude creatures from your channel, you empower those you do affect.

name: Selective Spell
benefit: Your allies need not fear friendly fire.

name: Self-Sufficient
benefit: You know how to get along in the wild and how to effectively treat wounds.

name: Self-sufficient, Mythic
benefit: Independence comes naturally to you, and you have mastered taking care of yourself.

name: Sense Link
benefit: When you and your eidolon share senses, your combined minds grant you exceptional powers of observation.

name: Shadow Caster
benefit: Your command over shadow and darkness create longer-lasting spell effects.

name: Shadow Ghost
benefit: You can move between the Shadow Plane and the Material Plane more often.

name: Shadow Strike
benefit: You accurately strike even those you cannot clearly see.

name: Shadow Walker
benefit: You can pierce the veil between the Shadow Plane and the Material Plane more often, and to greater effect.

name: Shadowy Dash
benefit: In dim light, you resemble little more than a shadow.

name: Shaitan Earthblast
prerequisites: Con 15, Wis 17, Elemental Fist**, Improved Unarmed Strike, Shaitan Skin, Shaitan Style, base attack bonus +13 or monk level 11th.
benefit: With a forceful stomp you release a blast of acid from the earth to burn your enemies.

name: Shaitan Skin
prerequisites: Con 15, Wis 15, Elemental Fist**, Improved Unarmed Strike, Shaitan Style, base attack bonus +11 or monk level 9th.
benefit: You can manipulate acid to shield yourself and disable your enemies.

name: Shaitan Style
prerequisites: Con 13, Wis 15, Elemental Fist**, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 5th.
benefit: You strike with the caustic forces from within the earth.

name: Shake It Off
benefit: You support your allies and help them recover from crippling effects.

name: Shamed
prerequisites: You must have been publicly embarrassed, or must have the Bastard Born background. If the embarrassment didn't cause significant harm to your personal honor or social standing, it does not qualify for the feat prerequisites. The humiliation doesn't need to have been unjustified.
benefit: A past humiliation haunts you to this day.

parsed_prerequisites.name: You must have been publicly embarrassed

parsed_prerequisites.detail: or must have the Bastard Born background. If the embarrassment didn't cause significant harm to your personal honor or social standing
it does not qualify for the feat prerequisites. The humiliation doesn't need to have been unjustified

name: Shapeshifter Foil
prerequisites: Knowledge (arcana) 5 ranks or Knowledge (nature) 5 ranks, ability to use any polymorph effect.
benefit: Your command of shapeshifting magic can disrupt similar effects in others.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: ability to use any polymorph effect

name: Shapeshifting Hunter
prerequisites: Favored enemy class feature, wild shape class feature.
benefit: You blend your knowledge of foes and your shapeshifting abilities together.

name: Shaping Focus
prerequisites: Wild shape class feature, Knowledge (nature) 5 ranks.
benefit: Your powers of shapeshifting outstrip your dabbling in the druidic faith.

name: Share Healing
prerequisites: Ability to acquire an animal companion, eidolon, familiar, or special mount.
benefit: Your link with your companion creature allows you to share with it any healing magic that's cast upon you.

parsed_prerequisites.name: Ability to acquire an animal companion

name: Shared Insight
benefit: You deftly direct others' attentions where you wish.

name: Shared Judgment
benefit: You extend the benefits of your judgment to an ally.

name: Shared Manipulation
benefit: You can subtly bolster allies' ability to misdirect and infuriate their enemies.

name: Sharp Senses
benefit: Your senses are especially sharp, even for your kind.

name: Sharpclaw
benefit: Your nails are large and strong.

name: Shatter Defenses
prerequisites: Weapon Focus, Dazzling Display, base attack bonus +6, proficiency with weapon.
benefit: Your skill with your chosen weapon leaves opponents unable to defend themselves if you strike them when their defenses are already compromised.

name: Shatter Defenses, Mythic
benefit: Your dazzling attacks leave your opponents flummoxed and bewildered, unable to attack you or to defend themselves effectively.

name: Shatterspell
benefit: Your mighty blows shatter your enemy's magic.

name: Shield Focus
benefit: You are skilled at deflecting blows with your shield.

name: Shield Focus, Mythic
benefit: You're a master of using your shield for protection.

name: Shield Master
prerequisites: Improved Shield Bash, Shield Proficiency, Shield Slam, Two-Weapon Fighting, base attack bonus +11.
benefit: Your mastery of the shield allows you to fight with it without hindrance.

name: Shield Proficiency
benefit: You are trained in how to properly use a shield.

name: Shield Slam
prerequisites: Improved Shield Bash, Shield Proficiency, Two-Weapon Fighting, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: In the right position, your shield can be used to send opponents flying.

name: Shield Slam, Mythic
benefit: Your shield bash produces a powerful kick.

name: Shield Specialization
prerequisites: Proficiency with selected shield, Shield Focus, fighter level 4th.
benefit: You have mastered the use of one type of shield.

name: Shield Wall
benefit: You form a unified defense with those around you.

name: Shield of Swings
prerequisites: Str 13, Power Attack, base attack bonus +1.
benefit: A wild frenzy of attacks serves to bolster your defenses.

name: Shielded Caster
benefit: Your allies cover you while you cast complicated spells.

name: Shot on the Run
prerequisites: Dex 13, Dodge, Mobility, Point-Blank Shot, base attack bonus +4.
benefit: You can move, fire a ranged weapon, and move again before your foes can react.

name: Shot on the Run, Mythic
prerequisites: Shot on the Run, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: With ease, you can snap off two shots while dashing across the battlefield.

name: Sickening Critical
benefit: Your critical hits cause opponents to become sickened.

name: Sickening Spell
benefit: You can sicken creatures with your spells.

name: Sidestep
benefit: You can reposition yourself after a foe's missed swing.

name: Siege Commander
prerequisites: Craft (siege weapon) 5 ranks, Knowledge (engineering) 5 ranks or Profession (siege engineer) 1 rank.
benefit: Under your leadership, the time required to assemble and move a siege engine is greatly reduced.

name: Siege Engineer
prerequisites: Knowledge (engineering) 5 ranks or Profession (siege engineer) 5 ranks, proficiency with one siege engine.
benefit: You are proficient with all siege weaponry.

name: Siege Gunner
benefit: Aiming outsized siege weapons poses little difficulty for you.

name: Signature Deed
benefit: You are known for performing a particular deed, and can perform it with greater ease.

name: Silent Kill
prerequisites: Stealth 12 ranks; assassinate advanced slayer talent or ninja master trick.
benefit: You are quite adept at killing your prey without making noise or alerting others.

parsed_prerequisites.detail: assassinate advanced slayer talent or ninja master trick

name: Silent Spell
benefit: You can cast your spells without making any sound.

name: Simple Weapon Proficiency
benefit: You are trained in the use of basic weapons.

name: Sin Seer
benefit: Unlike others who have taken the oath against undeath (see page 60), your preoccupation with the undead does not cloud your view of good and evil.

name: Skald's Vigor
benefit: Your song and your enthusiasm combine to invigorate you in battle.

name: Skeleton Summoner
prerequisites: Spell Focus (necromancy), ability to cast summon monster.
benefit: The walking dead respond to your call.

name: Skill Focus
benefit: Choose a skill. You are particularly adept at that skill.

name: Skill Focus, Mythic
benefit: You mastery with this skill is unmatched, even in difficult situations.

name: Skilled Driver
benefit: Choose a type a type of vehicle (either air, land, or water). You are more skilled when driving that vehicle.

name: Skilled Rager
benefit: With practice, you've mastered your rage to allow yourself more versatility.

name: Slashing Grace
prerequisites: Dex 13, Weapon Finesse, Weapon Focus with chosen weapon.
benefit: You can stab your enemies with your sword or another slashing weapon.

name: Slayer's Feint
prerequisites: Dex 15, Acrobatic or slayer level 1st, Combat Expertise, Acrobatics 1 rank.
benefit: You rely on your deceptive speed and agility instead of trickery to catch your opponents unprepared.

name: Slayer's Knack
prerequisites: Favored enemy class feature, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: You know how to battle your favored enemies with such efficacy that any weapon you wield against them becomes more deadly.

name: Sleep Venom
benefit: You can change the nature of your toxic spittle to put your enemies to sleep.

name: Sling Flail
benefit: You can use your loaded sling to effectively strike at nearby foes.

name: Slow Faller
prerequisites: Acrobatics 5 ranks or slow fall class feature.
benefit: You can reduce the amount of falling damage you take when you are close to a wall.

name: Smash
benefit: You overcome obstacles by breaking them.

name: Smell Fear
benefit: You can catch the sour scent of fear on the wind.

name: Snake Fang
prerequisites: Combat Reflexes, Improved Unarmed Strike, Snake Sidewind, Snake Style, Acrobatics 6 ranks, Sense Motive 9 ranks.
benefit: You can unleash attacks against an opponent that has dropped its guard.

name: Snake Sidewind
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Snake Style, Acrobatics 3 ranks, Sense Motive 6 ranks.
benefit: Your sensitive twisting movements make you difficult to anticipate combat.

name: Snake Style
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, Acrobatics 1 rank, Sense Motive 3 ranks.
benefit: You watch your foe's every movement and then punch through its defense.

name: Snap Shot
prerequisites: Dex 13, Point-Blank Shot, Rapid Shot, Weapon Focus, base attack bonus +6.
benefit: With a ranged weapon, you can take advantage of any opening in your opponent's defenses.

name: Snapping Turtle Clutch
prerequisites: Snapping Turtle Style, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +3 or monk level 3rd.
benefit: Your unarmed style allows you to turn your opponent's attack into an opportunity.

name: Snapping Turtle Shell
prerequisites: Snapping Turtle Clutch, Snapping Turtle Style, Improved Grapple, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +5 or monk level 5th.
benefit: Your guarding hand is almost magical in its skill at deflecting incoming blows.

name: Snapping Turtle Style
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +1 or monk level 1st.
benefit: Your deft unarmed style allows you to shield your body from harm.

name: Snatch
benefit: This creature can grab other creatures with ease.

name: Snatch Arrows
